caption: In a clinical simulation setting, two women wearing blue medical gowns, face masks, and gloves are training with a medical mannequin. One woman stands in the background, while the other is positioned in the foreground, focused on preparing a medical tool. The mannequin is lying on a table covered with a blue surgical drape and a white sheet. In the background, a green chair and medical equipment are visible against a plain wall. Across the frames, the woman in the foreground is carefully manipulating a small, thin object, possibly a needle or catheter, while the woman in the background observes. A logo with the text "Sim Week" appears in the bottom right corner of each frame. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with only slight movements in the hands of the foreground woman as she works.
